Checks the file reputation of the specified hash.

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. MicrosoftATP.File.GlobalPrevalence The file prevalence across the organization.
outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.Sha256

outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.GlobalFirstObserved

outputs.description: The last time the file was observed. MicrosoftATP.File.Size The size of the file.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The type of the file. MicrosoftATP.File.IsPeFile True if the file is portable executable, False otherwise.
outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.FileType

outputs.description: The file's publisher. MicrosoftATP.File.FileProductName The file product name.
outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.FilePublisher

outputs.description: The file signer. MicrosoftATP.File.Issuer The file issuer.
outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.Signer

outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.SignerHash

outputs.description: The file determination value. MicrosoftATP.File.DeterminationType The file determination type.
outputs.name: MicrosoftATP.File.DeterminationValue

outputs.name: File.SHA1

outputs.name: File.Type
